title: WorkflowDefinition
description: A pure-data, serializable workflow definition for the Sweny engine.

id.description: Unique machine-readable identifier. Used for persistence and import/export.

description.description: Optional description of what this workflow does.

initial.description: Id of the first step to execute. Must be a key in 'steps'.

steps.description: All steps keyed by their unique id. All routing must be explicit.

phase.description: Phase for swimlane grouping. 'learn' gathers data, 'act' does work, 'report' notifies.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the visual editor.

critical.description: If true, any failure immediately aborts the entire workflow.

next.description: Explicit default successor step id for linear chains. Use 'end' to stop successfully.

on.description: Outcome-based transitions. Keys: outcome string, status ('success'|'skipped'|'failed'), or '*' wildcard. Values: step id or 'end'.

uses.description: Provider roles this step depends on (e.g. ['observability', 'sourceControl']). Metadata only — for pre-flight validation and documentation.
